next_gap.subject: A267:trajectory_shape_transfer_retained
suggested_queries: Freeze the selected shape model before generating disjoint keys.
Does its gain transfer prospectively to new prefix groups?

terminal_chain.evidence: Materialized after trajectory-shape construction, nested evaluation, and all 256 shared-XOR controls.

causal_derivation.distinction_from_A249: A249 retained signed-log absolute cumulative and stage counts. A267 removes each channel's magnitude, retains its four-horizon profile plus first and second differences, and adds scale-free coupled event ratios including clause-learning morphology.

feature_contract.ratio_definition: (left_minus_right)_divided_by_(absolute_left_plus_absolute_right), with zero when both are zero
